title: ecbolium revolutum
intro: Ecbolium revolutum, also known as the Indian spikenard, is a flowering plant species native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, ecbolium revolutum can be used to make teas, infusions, and creams, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
